references.hebrew: וַיִּקַּח֙ מִזֶּ֣רַע הָאָ֔רֶץ וַֽיִּתְּנֵ֖הוּ בִּשְׂדֵה־זָ֑רַע קָ֚ח עַל־מַ֣יִם רַבִּ֔ים צַפְצָפָ֖ה שָׂמֽוֹ׃
references.english: He then took some of the seed of the landcland Emendation yields “cedar.” and planted it in a fertile field; he planted and set it like a willowdhe planted and set it like a willow Meaning of Heb. uncertain. beside abundant waters.
references.matched_snippet: קרא אמתניתא קח על מים רבים צפצפה שמו
